Name: Change Order
Gameplay_Text: Choose an active Mission. Replace one of its skill category requirements with a different skill category. (Ag · Env · Bio · Safety · Industrial · Media)

Name: Power Cycle
Gameplay_Text: Set aside two cards from your hand. Draw two cards. Shuffle the set aside cards into your deck.

Name: Call a Friend
Gameplay_Text: Search your deck for any Operator and deploy them immediately. Shuffle your deck.

Name: Train Operator
Gameplay_Text: Choose one of your Operators. That Operator gains 1 point in one of its existing skill categories.
